## What this PR adds or changes

<!-- One-liner: "Adds /command-name that does X" or "Improves agent-name to handle Y" -->

## Type

- [ ] New slash command
- [ ] New subagent
- [ ] Improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] Documentation / README fix
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, API keys, or PII — paths use `~/...` and keys use `<PLACEHOLDER>`
- [ ] Tested in my own `~/.claude/commands/` or `~/.claude/agents/` environment
- [ ] One skill per file; file placed in the correct folder (`commands/` or `agents/`)
- [ ] Frontmatter is present and accurate (`description`, `argument-hint` if applicable)
- [ ] Skill is general enough to be useful outside my specific setup

## Example invocation

```
/command-name example argument
```

<!-- or describe how to invoke the agent -->
